generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance GantryCraneActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical actuator system providing linear/rotary motion for the gantry crane, controlled via dedicated embedded controller for real-time operation"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Dedicated microcontroller (e.g., Raspberry Pi or Arduino) or PLC implementing real-time control algorithms for crane actuation"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance CranePositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision encoder system measuring real-time position and velocity of crane components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionData
]

instance CraneLoadCell : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Structural load monitoring system measuring container weight and stress distribution"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneLoadData
]

instance CraneEnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental monitoring sensors capturing temperature, humidity, and vibration data for operational context"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneEnvironmentalData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionEncoder
]

instance CraneLoadData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadCell
]

instance CraneEnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneEnvironmentalSensor
]

instance CraneExecutionLog : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Python-based kinematic simulation model using pybullet or pykinematics libraries to predict joint trajectories and structural dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicSimulationEnabler
]

instance CraneControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Optimal control implementation (PID tuning or model predictive control) using SciPy/NumPy for real-time operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance CraneHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing operational data (actuator positions, sensor readings) for post-analysis and trend evaluation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionData, CraneLoadData, CraneEnvironmentalData
]

instance CraneRealTimeTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Low-latency streaming data from physical crane to digital twin for immediate processing and validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionData, CraneExecutionLog
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker facilitating bidirectional, low-latency communication between physical crane and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTelemetryService, FaultDetectionService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ROSCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System middleware enabling standardized data exchange between physical actuators/sensors and digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, ControlOptimizationService
]

instance SQLiteDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight SQL-based database for storing historical operational data with efficient query capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance InfluxDBSensorDataEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database optimized for high-frequency sensor data storage and real-time analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTelemetryService
]

instance KinematicSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source kinematic simulation framework implementing physics-based modeling of crane motion dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ControlAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based control algorithm execution environment implementing optimal control strategies"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlOptimizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance VisualizationDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web-based visualization framework using Three.js/WebGL for interactive 3D/2D crane state rendering"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance DarTwinNotationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized notation system for documenting system changes and evolution of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeTelemetryService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous streaming of sensor/actuator data from physical crane to digital twin for immediate processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneRealTimeStateInsight, ImmediateControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Capture and storage of operational data for post-analysis and trend evaluation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalTrendInsight, HistoricalPerformanceAnalysisInsight
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implementation of algorithms to optimize crane movement, energy consumption, or operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyRecommendationInsight, OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based validation comparing kinematic predictions with physical sensor data to ensure consistency"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationConfidenceInsight, SynchronizationStatusInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection system identifying deviations in crane behavior through cross-referencing simulations with physical telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceRecommendationInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "CAD-based 3D/2D dashboard rendering real-time crane state (position, trajectory) for operators"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualStateInsight, OperatorInterfaceAction
]

instance DataDrivenInsightsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual analytics providing heatmaps and time-series plots correlating physical performance with digital twin predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceCorrelationInsight, DecisionSupportVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Kinematic trajectory planning service generating optimal movement paths based on digital twin simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanInsight, MovementOptimizationAction
]

instance SystemEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation-based documentation system tracking hardware/software updates and system changes"
    DTDFVocab:provides EvolutionDocumentationInsight, ChangeImpactAnalysisInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance CraneRealTimeStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current operational state of the gantry crane including position, velocity, and environmental conditions"
]

instance OperationalTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Longitudinal analysis of crane performance metrics showing operational patterns and degradation indicators"
]

instance EfficiencyRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven suggestions for improving crane operational efficiency through control parameter adjustments"
]

instance ValidationConfidenceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative measure of consistency between digital twin simulations and physical system behavior"
]

instance FaultAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time alerts identifying potential failures in actuators, structural components, or control systems"
]

instance VisualStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Graphical representation of crane state including real-time position, trajectory, and structural stress"
]

instance PerformanceCorrelationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Statistical correlation between digital twin predictions and actual physical performance metrics"
]

instance TrajectoryPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized movement path generated by the digital twin for safe and efficient crane operation"
]

instance ImmediateControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters based on real-time digital twin insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of optimized movement trajectories generated by the digital twin system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance suggestions based on anomaly detection and performance degradation analysis"
]

instance OperatorInterfaceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User interface actions enabling operators to interact with the digital twin visualization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MovementOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated optimization of crane movements through closed-loop control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EvolutionDocumentationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Documented record of system changes including hardware upgrades and control algorithm updates"
]

instance ChangeImpactAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of potential impacts from system changes on digital twin accuracy and performance"
]

instance HistoricalPerformanceAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical performance data to identify operational patterns and performance degradation"
]

instance SynchronizationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of synchronization between digital twin and physical system"
]

instance DecisionSupportVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualizations supporting decision-making based on digital twin insights"
]

// C18: Environments/Components
instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory setting providing precise experimentation conditions for the gantry crane system"
    base:contains GantryCraneSystem, DigitalTwinCore
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Complete cyber-physical system consisting of physical gantry crane, digital twin, and all supporting services"
    base:isContainedIn LabEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwinCore : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Central digital twin processing unit integrating all models, services, and enablers"
    base:isContainedIn LabEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this system is mediated by the **Control Application**, which generates and sends control commands to the **Physical Crane Interface**. Key components include:
- **Command Types**: Optimal movement trajectories generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**, designed to eliminate residual swinging motion at the end of movements.
- **Control Message Formats**: Commands are transmitted via the **Physical Crane Interface** (Python-based) to the crane controllers; exact format unspecified but inferred to align with the crane’s hardware API.
- **Validation and Authentication Mechanisms**: No explicit authentication mechanisms mentioned; validation occurs post-execution via the **Continuous Validation Service**, which compares real trajectories (from sensors) with simulated trajectories (from the **Simulation Service**). If discrepancies exceed acceptable thresholds, operators are notified via the **Dashboard**.
- **Feedback Systems**: The **Continuous Validation Service** acts as a feedback loop by comparing real-time sensor data with simulated predictions, enabling adaptive adjustments.
- **Conflict Resolution**: Not explicitly detailed; assumed to rely on operator intervention via the **Human Machine Interface** if the **Continuous Validation Service** flags anomalies.
- **Command Execution Confirmation**: No explicit confirmation mechanism described; reliance on the **Logging Application** for post-execution state logging.
"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents employ an ad-hoc orchestration approach rather than a commercial framework. The GreenhouseDT system uses **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage, **ActiveMQ** for message brokering, and **virtual machines** with pre-recorded data to facilitate synchronization between the physical greenhouse and its Digital Twin. The Air Quality Management exemplar integrates **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline implementation and relies on **AutomationML** for Digital Twin representation, with a Raspberry Pi acting as the physical sensor node. The Lab Scale Gantry Crane system is described using the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, implying a structured but unspecified orchestration pattern. Component integration is achieved via containerization/virtualization (e.g., virtual machines) and message brokers (e.g., ActiveMQ), while resource management is not explicitly detailed. System-wide coordination is implicit through these technologies but lacks formalized patterns or frameworks."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral models** for both physical and digital systems, implying dynamic validation mechanisms to ensure alignment between the twin and the greenhouse. However, no explicit methods for model fidelity quantification (e.g., RMSE, correlation analysis) or uncertainty sources (e.g., sensor noise, environmental variability) are described. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar focuses on **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction**, suggesting validation via comparative analysis against real-time sensor data, though no formal verification methods (e.g., Monte Carlo simulations) are mentioned. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** exemplar does not detail fidelity/validity considerations in the provided documents, though the C4 Model implies architectural validation through software testing frameworks. No quality assurance processes (e.g., ISO/IEC standards) or error correction mechanisms are referenced."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s Technical Connection** infrastructure is centered around an **MQTT Broker** for inter-service communication, with the following specifics:
- **Communication Protocols**: MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport) for signaling between containers (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Continuous Validation Service**).
- **Network Topology and Architecture**: Not explicitly detailed, but implied to be a centralized architecture with the **MQTT Broker** as the hub for service communication. The **Physical Crane Interface** connects directly to the crane hardware.
- **Bandwidth and Latency Requirements**: Not quantified; assumed to be low-latency given the real-time nature of crane control and validation (e.g., sub-second response times for trajectory adjustments).
- **Reliability and Redundancy Mechanisms**: No redundancy mechanisms mentioned; reliance on the **Continuous Validation Service** for anomaly detection and operator intervention.
- **Security Protocols**: Not explicitly mentioned; assumed to be minimal or none, given the lab-scale context and lack of explicit security references.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is described as follows:
- **Hosting Platforms**: Not explicitly specified; implied to be **on-premise** given the lab-scale context and lack of cloud/edge references.
- **Computational Requirements**: The **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, and **Continuous Validation Service** require computational resources for kinematics modeling, simulation, and distance metric calculations (e.g., trajectory comparison). No specific hardware specs provided.
- **Storage Requirements**: Data is stored in a **TimescaleDB** (time-series database), which is optimized for high-volume, time-stamped data (e.g., crane sensor logs, trajectory records).
- **Scalability Mechanisms**: Not explicitly detailed; assumed to be limited by the lab-scale scope and lack of distributed deployment references.
- **Deployment Models Supported**: No explicit mention; implied to be a monolithic or loosely coupled deployment (via MQTT) on a single machine or local network.
- **Availability/Reliability Assurance**: No redundancy or failover mechanisms described; reliance on operator monitoring via the **Dashboard** and manual intervention for anomalies.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems exhibit limited horizontal integration with external systems. The GreenhouseDT exemplar integrates **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for internal communication, with no explicit mention of interoperability standards or dependencies on external enterprise systems. The Air Quality Management exemplar uses **Microsoft Azure tools**, which suggests potential integration with cloud-based services (e.g., Azure IoT Hub, Azure Functions) but does not detail specific protocols or standards. The Raspberry Pi-based sensor system in this exemplar relies on AutomationML, a standardized format for digital twins, which could facilitate interoperability with other AutomationML-compatible systems. The Lab Scale Gantry Crane system is not described in terms of external integration, and no data exchange protocols or interoperability standards are mentioned. Overall, integration patterns are ad-hoc and limited to internal components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "
    - **GreenhouseDT**:
      - **Standards**: No explicit compliance mentioned; relies on open-source tools (InfluxDB, ActiveMQ).
      - **Interoperability**: Uses message brokers (ActiveMQ) for communication, but no industry standards (e.g., OPC UA, ISO 15926) are adopted.
      - **Certification**: Not applicable.

    - **Air Quality Management**:
      - **Standards**:
        - **AutomationML**: Used for digital twin representation (ISO 15930 for PLM interoperability).
        - **Microsoft Azure**: Likely adheres to Azure’s compliance frameworks (e.g., GDPR, ISO 27001) but not explicitly for DTs.
      - **Interoperability**: AutomationML enables cross-domain data exchange; Azure supports cloud interoperability.
      - **Certification**: Not mentioned.

    - **Lab Scale Gantry Crane**:
      - **Standards**: Not described; architecture visualization (C4 Model) is generic.
      - **Interoperability**: No mention of standards (e.g., OPC UA for industrial systems).
      - **Certification**: Not applicable.

    **Common Observations**:
    - **Partial Standardization**:
      - **GreenhouseDT**: No DT-specific standards; relies on generic tech stacks.
      - **Air Quality Management**: AutomationML is a DT representation standard, but no broader compliance (e.g., ISO 23247 for DTs).
    - **No Industry-Specific Compliance**: None of the exemplars reference DT-specific frameworks (e.g., ISO/IEC 42010 for architecture, ISO 15926 for PLM).
    - **Interoperability Gaps**: Only AutomationML is explicitly standardized; others use ad-hoc or commercial tools without clear compliance.
  "
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "
The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar employs **InfluxDB** for data storage, which inherently includes basic access control mechanisms (e.g., role-based permissions) and encryption for data at rest. However, explicit documentation on **cybersecurity protocols** (e.g., TLS for data-in-transit, OAuth 2.0 for authentication) or **threat mitigation strategies** (e.g., intrusion detection systems, anomaly detection) is not provided. The system relies on **ActiveMQ** for message brokering, which supports **JMS security policies** but lacks detailed descriptions of **fail-safe mechanisms** or **risk assessment approaches** in the provided context.

The **Air Quality Management** exemplar utilizes **Raspberry Pi sensors** and **AutomationML-based digital twins**, with **Microsoft Azure** hosting the pipeline. Azure provides built-in **security controls** (e.g., Azure Active Directory for authentication, role-based access control, and encryption for data storage). However, the documents do not specify **data anonymization techniques**, **consent management frameworks**, or **data sharing agreements** for third-party access. The exemplar does not explicitly mention **safety-critical system considerations** (e.g., compliance with IEC 62443 for industrial cybersecurity) or **fail-safe protocols** for sensor failures or network disruptions.

The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system lacks explicit documentation on **security and safety measures** in the provided context. While the **C4 Model** is used for architecture visualization, no details are provided regarding **access control mechanisms**, **authentication systems**, or **threat mitigation strategies** (e.g., secure communication protocols, hardware-level security for IoT devices). Similarly, **risk assessment approaches** (e.g., FMEA for failure modes) or **safety-critical system considerations** (e.g., emergency stop protocols) are not addressed in the given documents."
]
